issues.detail: The skill does not cover error scenarios or edge cases, focusing only on happy path.

scenarios.name: README for a Node.js CLI image converter
scenarios.rationale: Treatment follows the full README template — H1, one-line description, Installation, Quick Start, Usage with multiple commands, Options table (flag/type/default/description), Configuration table, Contributing link, and License; baseline produces a usable but partial README missing the structured Options table and full sectioning.

scenarios.name: API endpoint docs from Express routes
scenarios.rationale: Treatment renders per-endpoint method+path code block, request-body table with Field/Type/Required/Description, curl example, 201 JSON response, and error responses table with status codes; baseline gives loose JSON snippets without per-field tables or error code tables.
